subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Should ye become aware of the mysteries of God's bestowals, ye would, from the intensity of rapture and overwhelming joy, rend your garments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی اگر مطلع بر اسرار الطاف الهی گردید از فرط شعف و غلبه شعف جامه
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @The Holy Spirit
